title: Armor Stand Poses
description: Bedrock armor stand poses for Java Edition
body:
This datapack adds poses to armor stands like bedrock edition. Redstone is the same as bedrock. (if Redstone doesn't work like bedrock let me know.) right now the only way to change pose is by Redstone, below shows at what power level will change pose.
This datapack also adds arms to all armor stands.
 
[![sponsor](https://legopitstop.weebly.com/files/theme/banner_9.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/legopitstop)
Click on the above image, select plan (at least 4GB), use code `legopitstop` to get 25% off your first month and enjoy playing with your friends!

## Power Pose Name
- 01 default pose
- 02 no pose
- 03 solemn pose
- 04 Athena pose
- 05 brandish pose
- 06 honor pose
- 07 entertain pose
- 08 salute pose
- 09 riposte pose
- 10 zombie pose
- 11 cancan 1 pose
- 12 cancan 2 pose
- 13 hero pose
- 14 default pose
- 15 default pose

## FAQ
### Can I add this to my mod pack?
Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?
I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.
